en.text: from H1004 and H1168 and H4583; house of Baal of (the) habitation of (apparently by transposition); or (shorter) lemma בֵּית מעוֹן missing vowel, corrected to בֵּית מְעוֹן; house of habitation of (Baal); Beth-Baal-Meon, a place in Palestine

senses.gloss_en: from H1004 and H1168 and H4583; house of Baal of (the) habitation of (apparently by transposition); or (shorter) lemma בֵּית מעוֹן missing vowel, corrected to בֵּית מְעוֹן; house of habitation of (Baal); Beth-Baal-Meon, a place in Palestine
